goal: Competitive market brief on note-taking apps
reason: The brief does not close in one pass. Draft, review, then revise by what the review found. Run the whole structure in rounds until it converges.
stop: converged on round 2 (round 2 improved on round 1, a third round would be a dry round)

children.reason: Front-to-back dependency: you must collect before you can analyze, analyze before you can write, write before you can review. Each step consumes the previous step's output.

children.goal: Gather raw material on each competitor
children.reason: The three competitors are independent. Gathering on one does not wait on gathering on another, so fan them into parallel branches.
Notion is too large to summarize flat: multiple product lines, several pricing tiers, a broad positioning. This node is a seed, not a leaf, so it opens its own smaller structure in place.

children.goal: Notion product lines (docs, wiki, projects, calendar, AI)
children.reason: Small enough to handle in one pass.

children.goal: Notion pricing tiers (free, plus, business, enterprise)
children.reason: Small enough to handle in one pass.
Small enough to handle in one pass.
One focused product, small enough to summarize in one pass. Leaving it a leaf is the honest decision; forcing a depth sweep here would pay nothing.
One focused product, small enough to summarize in one pass.

children.goal: Analyze the collected material across dimensions
children.reason: The three dimensions (pricing, features, positioning) are independent lenses. Each can run without waiting on the others, so fan them into parallel branches.
A direct comparison over collected data, one pass.
A direct comparison over collected data, one pass.
A direct comparison over collected data, one pass.

children.goal: Write the brief from the analysis
children.reason: A single drafting pass over the finished analysis.

children.goal: Review the draft and verify the structure was honest
children.reason: A single adversarial pass: is any dependency false, is any split unpaid, is the recommendation supported. Its finding feeds the next time-axis round.
